sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires degraded late transcript handling but does not state whether degradation after continuity proof can still attach.
decisionTaken: Continuity may prove request relationship, but degraded or contradictory transcript materiality becomes unresolved and blocks manual review with artifact_degraded fallback.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Relationship proof and safety usability are separate concepts; degraded evidence must not silently update routine status.
operationalRisk: Manual review queues may increase when transcription quality is poor.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Only a new safety-usability policy can relax degraded transcript blocking, and it must keep explicit reason codes.
